message:
feat(cli): implement semantic diff and refine core modules

Add semantic diff implementation and refine core module implementations
for improved functionality.

src/cli/commands/diff.rs:
- Semantic skill comparison beyond text diff
- Frontmatter field-by-field comparison
- Section-level change detection
- Code block diff highlighting
- Disclosure level change tracking
- Output formatting for terminal and robot modes

src/core/skill.rs:
- Minor refinement to skill struct fields

src/security/acip.rs:
- Pattern matching refinements
- Improved detection accuracy

src/storage/sqlite.rs:
- Connection handling refinement

The diff command enables understanding semantic changes between
skill versions rather than just textual differences, making it
easier to review skill updates and evolution.

Usage:
- ms diff skill1 skill2: Compare two skills
- ms diff skill --since <commit>: Compare to historical version
- ms diff --format json: Machine-readable output

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
